title: viburnum tinus subsp. subcordatum
intro: Viburnum tinus subsp. subcordatum, also known as the evergreen viburnum, is a subspecies of the Viburnum tinus plant, a type of flowering evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viburnum tinus subsp. subcordatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from anxiety and insomnia, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Viburnum tinus subsp. subcordatum can be consumed as a herbal tea, made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or used in combination with other herbs in tinctures and infusions.
